scripts.prebuild: rm -rf public/dashboard data && mkdir -p public/dashboard/js/pages data/runs && cp ../web/index.html ../web/styles.css public/dashboard/ && node scripts/build-jsx.mjs && cp public/dashboard/js/shared.js public/dashboard/_shared.js && date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ > public/dashboard/__build_marker.txt && ls -la public/dashboard public/dashboard/js && (cp ../runs/*.jsonl data/runs/ 2>/dev/null || true)
